overview: Craft Men's Clinic provides personalized testosterone replacement therapy and hormone optimization through telemedicine video calls. Care includes medications delivered to your home, along with supplements, exercise guidance, counseling, and regular monitoring.
highlights: Medications delivered directly to your door or available for pickup at compound pharmacies
Regular monitoring appointments starting 6 weeks after treatment, then every 90 days
targetAudience: Men experiencing symptoms of low testosterone or hormone imbalance seeking remote healthcare management.
